info.title: Generic Fake Swagger for JSON-Schema Models
info.description: Generic Fake Swagger for JSON-Schema Models

eventServiceCategory.description:
Category of the service for an event
Identifies the ressource associated to the action leading to an event
For example, IAS_ONLINE_AUTH
The type of event within the service is detailed by the eventNature

eventNature.description:
Nature/type of an event
Identifies the nature/type of event associated to action leading to an event within a service (eventServiceCategory)
Example for IAS_ONLINE_AUTH : equivalent to MTI
IAS_ONLINE_AUTH_AUTHORISATION (event 0100/0101/0110)
IAS_ONLINE_AUTH_ADVICE (event 0120/0121/0130)
IAS_ONLINE_AUTH_REVERSAL (event 0400/0401/0410)
IAS_ONLINE_AUTH_REVERSAL ADVICE (event 0420/0421/0430)
IAS_ONLINE_AUTH_FILE_REQUEST (event 0300/0301/0310)
IAS_ONLINE_AUTH_FILE_ADVICE (event 0320/0321/0330)

institutionId.description:
Issuer institution Id
Identifier of the bank in the CMS and IAS

id.description:
Cardholder Id
Technical identifier of the cardholder in the banking system.
This identifier is provided during the subscription by the bank.
Afterwards, it is used by the CMS to retrieve the cardholder data from the bank.

civility.description:
cardholder title
Equivalent to DE117-4 in CBAE protocol

lastName.description:
last name
Equivalent to DE117-8 in CBAE protocol

phoneNumber.description:
phone number
Equivalent to DE107-1 in CBAE protocol

primaryAccountNumberId.description:
Primary Account Number ID
Identifier (also called PANid) associated to the PAN of the card.
The PANid is generated (in the form of an UUID v4) by Estreem during the processing of the subscription request sent to the CMS (either when the PAN is calculated by the CMS or when the PAN is provided by the bank).
The PANid is provided to the bank in the subscription response.
The PANid is used in further exchanges of the CMS and the IAS.

encryptedPrimaryAccountNumber.description:
encrypted pan
The encryption is done using JSON Web Encryption standard.
Once decrypted it represents a Primary Account Number (PAN), which is a 16 to 19 numeric characters string.

maskedPrimaryAccountNumber.description:
Masked Primary Account Number
Displayable version of the PAN with masked caracters

sequenceNumber.description:
Card Sequence Number
Equivalent to DE23 in ISO8583 based protocols

expiryDate.description:
Expiry date
Format (ISO8601) : YYYY-MM ; Example 2024-12
Equivalent to DE14 in ISO8583 based protocols

affectationCountryCode.description:
Affectation Country Code
Issuer country code on the CB network
The country is provided as a ISO 3166, Text -3 code

mastercardIssuerCountry.description:
mastercard issuer country code
Issuer country code on the Mastercard network
The country is provided as a ISO 3166, Text -3 code

visaCommercialCountry.description:
visa commercial country code
Issuer country code on the Visa network
The country is provided as a ISO 3166, Text -3 code

accountId.description:
Account Id linked to the card
Technical identifier of the banking account associated to the card contract/agreement
This identifier is provided to the CMS during the subscription by the bank.
It will be sent by the CMS to the IAS so that the IAS can use this identifier during the authorisation process to contact the banking Host (for balance check) or for standin purposes.

x-enumDescriptions.PWNF: CBAE 1.5 Value : 00  Payment or Transaction with no special features

accountNature.description:
Nature of the account linked to the card
This nature is provided to the CMS during the subscription by the bank.
Note : in the current version of the CMS the nature of the account is not defined in the subscription API of the CMS and a default account nature (PWNF-00) will be used.

It will be sent by the CMS to the IAS so that the IAS can use this nature during the authorisation process to contact the banking Host (for balance check) or for standin purposes.

In most cases, PWNF-00 (default), DEAC-20 (debit) or CRAC-30 (credit) will be used for debit and credit accounts but for completeness the following values are available.
Value : Label (ISO8583 based protocols value)
---------------------------------------------------------------------
CRAC : CBAE 1.5 Value : 30 Credit account
CHAC : CBAE 1.5 Value : 36 Charge account
DEAC : CBAE 1.5 Value : 20 Debit account
DECL : CBAE 1.5 Value : 33 Deferred clearing
DEDA : CBAE 1.5 Value : 35 Deferred debit account
PRAC : CBAE 1.5 Value : 60 Prepaid account
PWNF : CBAE 1.5 Value : 00 Payment or Transaction with no special features
SAAC : CBAE 1.5 Value : 10 Saving account
INAC : 50 MCD : Investment Account
INLA : 90 MCD : Loan Account
LOAC : 91 MCD : Installment Loan Account
RELA : 92 MCD : Real Estate Loan Account
UNAC : 40 VISA & MCD : “Universal” Account

agreementEntityId.description:
Card agreement entity Id
Identifier of the physical or logical entity linked to the card contract (entity that signed the contract with the cardholder; for example, a branch).
This identifier is provided to the CMS during the subscription by the bank.
Afterward, it is used by the CMS to retrieve the entity data from the bank. (the API to retrieve these data are not supported in this version and the retrieval of these data is simulated by the CMS) and by the IAS in messages sent to the bank

application.description:
Card Application Type
Equivalent to DE055-DF81 in CBAE protocol
Value : Label
---------------------------------------------------------------------
CBLK : EMV
CLST : Contactless integrated circuit - magstripe context

applicationId.description:
Application Identifier
Equivalent to DE055-9F06 in CBAE protocol

applicationInterchangeProfile.description:
Application Interchange Profile
Equivalent to DE055-0082 in CBAE protocol

brand.description:
Brand of the card (Scheme)
Equivalent to DE47.98 part 1 (network source) in CBAE protocol (domestic french data)
Value : Label
---------------------------------------------------------------------
CBFR : CB
VISA : VISA
MACD : Mastercard

contactlessDevice.description:
Contactless Device
Equivalent to DE055-DF86 in CBAE protocol

blockingDate.description:
Blocking date
The date is specified in the following form (ISO 8601 date format)
Equivalent to DE117-2 in CBAE protocol

blockingRegulatoryReasonCode.description:
BlockingRegulatoryReasonCodeset
Equivalent to DE117-1 in CBAE protocol
Value : Label
---------------------------------------------------------------------
ABUS : Abusive
FRAU : Fraudulent
LOST : Lost card
NDLC : Not delivered card
STLN : Stolen card

compromisedSecretCodeIndicator.description:
Indicator of compromission of the secret code
Indicates if the secret code has been compromised (known by an illegitimate holder of the card).
Equivalent to DE117-9 in CBAE protocol

forcingFlagAndOrigin.description:
Forcing flag and origin
Equivalent to DE117-10 in CBAE protocol

lossTheftCountryCode.description:
Loss theft country code
Equivalent to DE117-11 in CBAE protocol

lossTheftDepartmentCode.description:
Loss theft department code
Equivalent to DE117-12 in CBAE protocol

emvImplementationCode.description:
Code identifying the EMV chip implementation
The code identifies the EMV chip implementation for which EMV scripts will be applied.
Value : Label
---------------------------------------------------------------------
CPCE : CPACE
MC10 : M/CHIP 4 CVN 10
VS18 : VIS 1.5 CVN18 or VIS 1.6 CVN 18 with VIS 1.5 retro-compatibility
VS22 : VIS 1.5 CVN 22

encryptedVirtualCardPrimaryAccountNumber.description:
Encrypted virtual card primary account number
Equivalent to DE59-302 in CBAE protocol

issuerScriptId.description:
Issuer EMV script identifier
Identifies the script received from the SAE during a script campaign

lostOrStolenDate.description:
Card lost or stolen date
Date when the card was lost or stolen (also called initial blocking date). This data is provided to the CMS.
The date is specified in the following form (ISO 8601 date format)
Equivalent to DE117-6 in CBAE protocol

oppositionDateTime.description:
Opposition date and time
Equivalent to DE117-7 to CBAE protocol
The date and time are specified in the following form (ISO8601 datetime format)

paymentAccountReference.description:
Payment account reference
(PAR)
Equivalent to DE57.0056 in CBAE protocol (domestic french data)

productCode.description:
Product Code
Product code of the card contract/agreement
The values to be used during the subscription with the CMS are defined in the parameters associated to the product catalog.

schemeProductCode.description:
Card Product (Scheme)
Equivalent to DE47.98 part 2 (product code) in CBAE protocol (domestic french data)
The value depends on the brand of the card (cardBrand)

x-enumDescriptions.CVDC: Card with dynamic card security code (CVD)
x-enumDescriptions.CVST: Card with static card security code

securityCodeIndicator.description:
Card type indicator
Indicates the type of CVV2 check.
Value : Label
---------------------------------------------------------------------
CVDC : Card with dynamic card security code (CVD) (DE057-0018)
CVDG : Card with digital card security code
CVST : Card with static card security code

serviceCode.description:
Service Code
Equivalent to DE40 in CBAE protocol

code.description:
Card current usage code
Code defining the context of use of the usage limit
Value : Label
---------------------------------------------------------------------
PDOM : Purchase DOMestic
PINT : Purchase INTernational
PTOT : Purchase TOTal
WGRD : Withdrawal GRoup Domestic
WGRI : Withdrawal GRoup International
WNGD : Withdrawal Not Group Domestic
WNGI : Withdrawal Not Group International
WTOT : Withdrawal TOTal

category.description:
Card current usage category
Category defining whether the usage limit is an amount or a number
Value : Label
---------------------------------------------------------------------
AMNT : Amount
NUBR : Number

amount.description:
Amount of the current usage value
Amount and currency of the current usage managed by the authorization server after the processing of the transaction.
This amount is significant if the usageCurrentValueCategory is set as AMNT.
The curency is provided as a ISO 4217, Numeric-3 code.
The amount is provided as a number of monetary units specified in a currency where the unit of currency is implied by the context and compliant with ISO 4217. The decimal separator is a dot.

limitAmount.description:
Current amount active for the usage limit
Amount and currency of the current active limit
This amount is significant if the usageCurrentValueCategory is set as AMNT
The curency is provided as a ISO 4217, Numeric-3 code.
The amount is provided as a number of monetary units specified in a currency where the unit of currency is implied by the context and compliant with ISO 4217. The decimal separator is a dot.

limitNumber.description:
Currrent number active for the usage limit
Number of the current limit set at the product level
This number is significant if the usageCurrentValueCategory is set as NUBR

number.description:
Number of the current usage value
Number of the current usage managed by the authorization server before the processing of the transaction.
This number is significant if the usageCurrentValueCategory is set as NUBR

value.description:
Payment token value
Equivalent to DE105-1 in CBAE protocol

Token address

x-enumDescriptions.VPME: 02 V.ME (CB2AF 1.5.0 et plus a partir de 1.6.0)

name.description:
digital wallet name

PEPS

Acquirer Reference Identification

id of independant sales organisation

x-enumDescriptions.MPPI: mPOS solution can accept PIN (incoming only)

pinEntryCapability.description:
Pin Entry Capability
Equivalent to DE22 part 2 in ISO8583 based protocols
Value : Label
---------------------------------------------------------------------
MPPI : mPOS solution can accept PIN (incoming only)
NOTS : Not specified (incoming only)
TACP : Terminal can accept PIN

id.description:
Terminal identifier
Card acceptor terminal identification
Equivalent to DE41 in ISO8583 based protocols

Identifier of the point of acceptance terminal application
Point Of Interaction (POI) components identifier (ITP PA - ITP TA)

x-enumDescriptions.CPOC: smartphone/tablet without dongle, when the card is read in contactless mode using the NFC device and there is no PIN entry
x-enumDescriptions.MPOC: smartphone/tablet without dongle, when the card is read in contactless mode with PIN entry on the device screen
x-enumDescriptions.MPOS: smartphone/tablet with a PCI PTS dongle to read the card with PIN entry on the dongle
x-enumDescriptions.SPOC: smartphone/tablet with a PCI PTS dongle to read the card with PIN entry on the device screen

poiInformation.description:
point of interaction information
(POI)
Equivalent to DE47.31 in CBAE protocol (domestic french data)
Value : Label (ISO8583 based protocols value)
---------------------------------------------------------------------
CPOC : Smartphone/tablet without dongle, when the card is read in contactless mode using the NFC device and there is no PIN entry (3)
MPOC : Smartphone/tablet without dongle, when the card is read in contactless mode with PIN entry on the device screen (4)
MPOS : Smartphone/tablet with a PCI PTS dongle to read the card with PIN entry on the dongle (1)
SPOC : Smartphone/tablet with a PCI PTS dongle to read the card with PIN entry on the device screen (2)

poiLogicalNumber.description:
Logical number
Point Of Interaction (POI) logical number
Equivalent to DE59.0204 in CBAE protocol (domestic french data)

idInterbankAppSoftVersion.description:

idRefSpecVersion.description:

Equivalent to DE59.0201.p2 in CBAE protocol (domestic french data)

idTerminalModelReference.description:
Acceptance System Components Identifier (ex ITP SA) - Terminal Model Reference
Equivalent to DE59.0201.p3 in CBAE protocol (domestic french data)

capabilities.description:
Terminal Capabilities
Equivalent to DE055-9F33 in CBAE protocol

x-enumDescriptions.CCEC: Contactless chip card reader - EMV chip context
x-enumDescriptions.CCMC: Contactless chip card reader - magnetic stripe context

cardReadingCapabilities.description:
Card Reading Capabilities
Card entry capability from the point of service data code
Equivalent to DE47.03 part 1 in CBAE protocol (domestic french data)
Value : Label (ISO8583 based protocols value)
---------------------------------------------------------------------
UNKW : Unknown (0)
MANU : Manual, no terminal (1)
MAGS : Magstripe reader (2)
CCEC : Contactless chip card reader - EMV chip context (3)
CCMC : Contactless chip card reader - magnetic stripe context (4)
ICCR : Integrated circuit card reader (5)
KEYI : Keypad input (6)
CCCR : Contactless chip card reader (8)
REPV : Reserved for private use (9)
NCEC : No card entry Capability

countryCode.description:
Acceptance System Country Code
Acceptance system country code (ISO 3166, Numeric-3 code)
Equivalent to DE59.0205 in CBAE protocol (domestic french data)

ipAddress.description:
IP Address
Equivalent to DE057-0010 in CBAE protocol

visaAcceptanceCharacteristics.description:
VISA terminal type.
Acceptance characteristics
Equivalent to DE59.0605 in CBAE protocol and to DE60.1 in BASEI protocol

endToEndTransId.description:
End to End transaction Id
Unique identifier generated by the IAS to identify the transaction.
On transactions received by the IAS :
- For authorisation and for authorisation advice, this identifier is equivalent to the internal operation reference identifier (operationReferenceId).
- For reversal transactions, this identifier is the identifier of the original transaction.

ecommerceTransactionId.description:
Transaction identifier or cryptogram supplied by the acceptor
Unique reference number to identify a secured electronic commerce transaction. This identifier is used in some electronic commerce cryptogram calculation methods or is a cryptogram generated by the acceptance solution.
Equivalent to DE59.0400 in CBAE protocol (domestic french data)

localDateTime.description:
Date Time in local region
Equivalent to DE12, DE13 and DE59.102 in ISO8583 based protocols
The date and time are specified in the following form (ISO8601 datetime format)

reference.description:
Transaction Reference
Also called transaction audit number
Equivalent to DE11 in ISO8583 based protocols

transmissionGmtDateTime.description:
Transmission date and time GMT
Equivalent to DE7 in ISO8583 based protocols
The date and time are specified in the following form (ISO8601 datetime format)

msgReceivedDateTime.description:
Date Time the processor has received a question
The date and time are specified in the following form (ISO8601 datetime format)

msgSentDateTime.description:
Date Time the processor has sent a response
The date and time are specified in the following form (ISO8601 datetime format)

accountBalance.description:
Account balance (all cards)
Equivalent to DE054-02 in CBAE protocol

PRAC : CBAE 1.5 Value : 60 Prepaid account

x-enumDescriptions.PWNF: CBAE 1.5 Value : 00  Payment or Transaction with no special features

nomenclature.description:
Nomenclature
Indicates the encoding of the 'additional data type'
Equivalent to DE59.0414 part 1 in CBAE protocol (domestic french data)
Value : Label (ISO8583 bases protocols value)
----------------------------------------------------------------
CBFR : CB (3)
VISA : VISA (1)
MCRD : Mastercard (2)

Type of additional data
Equivalent to DE59.0414 part 2 in CBAE protocol (domestic french data)
Value : Label (ISO8583 bases protocols value)
----------------------------------------------------------------
PAYL : Paylib (02 for CB nomenclature)

x-enumDescriptions.OSHE: OTP on secured hardware element (e.g. CAP, SIM)
x-enumDescriptions.OSSE: OTP on secured software element (e.g. SEA)
x-enumDescriptions.OTPT: OTP on telephone (e.g. SMS, SVI, token)
x-enumDescriptions.REPA: Repeatable password (e.g. date of birth, password, postal code)

authenticationMethod.description:
Additional Authentication Method
Additional authentication method used to authenticate the electronic commerce transaction
Equivalent to DE59.0414 part 4 in CBAE protocol (domestic french data)
Value : Label (ISO8583 bases protocols value)
----------------------------------------------------------------
NAUT : No additional authentication (00)
REPA : Repeatable password (e.g. date of birth, password, postal code) (01)
OTPT : OTP via telephone (e.g. SMS, SVI, token) (02)
OSSE : OTP via secured software element (e.g. SEA) (03)
OSHE : OTP via secured hardware element (e.g. CAP, SIM) (04)

x-enumDescriptions.IRME: 03 Initial use, Risk management engine unavailable
x-enumDescriptions.IUNA: 01 Initial use, No additional authentication requested
x-enumDescriptions.IURM: 02 Initial use, Risk management engine requests additional strong authentication
x-enumDescriptions.RMRA: 12 Risk management engine requests additional strong authentication

authenticationReasonCode.description:
Additional Authentication Reason Code
Equivalent to DE59.0414 part 5 in CBAE protocol (domestic french data)
Value : Label (ISO8583 bases protocols value)
----------------------------------------------------------------
IUNA : Initial use, No additional authentication requested (01)
IURM : Initial use, Risk management engine requests additional strong authentication (02)
IRME : Initial use, Risk management engine unavailable (03)
NAAR : No additional authentication requested (11)
RMRA : Risk management engine requests additional strong authentication (12)
RMEU : Risk management engine unavailable (13)

authorisedAmount.description:
Authorised Amount
Equivalent to DE55-9F02 & 55-5F2A in CBAE protocol

billingAmount.description:
Billing amount
Amount, currency and exchange rate of the cardholder billing
Equivalent to DE6, DE51 and DE10 in ISO8583 based protocols
This data element is used only in messages where both amounts (transaction and cardholder amounts) are supported. As a consequence, it is not used in checkBalance message where totalAmount is used to exchange one single amount.
The curency is provided as a ISO 4217, Numeric-3 code.
The amount is provided as a number of monetary units specified in a currency where the unit of currency is implied by the context and compliant with ISO 4217. The decimal separator is a dot.
The exchange rate is expressed as a decimal

cardAuthenticationResultCode.description:
Card authentication result code
Equivalent to DE55-DFD0 in CBAE protocol

cardholderTotalAmount.description:
Cardholder total amount
Total amount of the current transaction and of completed financial transactions that a terminal has performed for a cardholder
Equivalent to DE59.0207 in CBAE protocol (domestic french data)

cardSecurityCodeVerificationResultsOrigi.description:
Response origin
Equivalent to DE059-0301-p1 in CBAE protocol
Value : Label
---------------------------------------------------------------------
CISS : Card issuer
STIN : Stand-in

cardSecurityCodeVerificationResultsText.description:
Text of response
Equivalent to DE059-0301-p2 in CBAE protocol

cashAmount.description:
Cash amount
Equivalent to DE054-40 in CBAE protocol

acceptanceSystemLogicalNumber.description:
Logical Number of POS
Acceptance system logical number
Equivalent to DE59.0203 in CBAE protocol (domestic french data)

acsTransactionId.description:
ACS Transaction ID
Equivalent to DE057-0023-p2 for an ACS ID in CBAE protocol

authenticationAmount.description:
Authentication amount
Equivalent to DE057-0038 in CBAE protocol

authenticationDateTime.description:
Authentication date
Equivalent to DE057-0037 in CBAE protocol
The date and time are specified in the following form (ISO8601 datetime format)

x-enumDescriptions.CCEC: Contactless chip transaction using EMV chip data
x-enumDescriptions.CCMD: Contactless chip transaction using magstripe data
x-enumDescriptions.EDRP: Digital Secure Remote Payment using EMV
x-enumDescriptions.MAAR: Magstripe, after attempt to read chip
x-enumDescriptions.MFLB: Manual fallback from an EMV capable terminal

cardDataEntryMode.description:
Card entry mode
Card data entry technology used at Point-Of-Service.
It is determined by the IAS from transaction data such as the POS entry mode, EMV cryptogram presence, wallet information, etc.
It is providing more accurate information than the card data entry mode (panEntryMode).
Value : Label
---------------------------------------------------------------------
NOTS : Not specified
MAGS : Magstripe
CCEC : Contactless chip transaction using EMV chip data
CCMD : Contactless chip transaction using magstripe data
ICCR : Integrated circuit card reader
MANE : Manual entry
MAAR : Magstripe, after attempt to read chip
PVBS : Provided by a server
COFT : Card-on-File
BRCD : Bar code
EDRP : Digital Secure Remote Payment using EMV
EDGR : EMV downgraded
MFLB : Manual fallback from an EMV capable terminal
OCRD : OCR

cardholderAuthenticationValue.description:
Cardholder authentication value
The cardholder authentication value contains the cryptogram generated when a secure remote payment transaction is authenticated
Equivalent to DE59.0401 in CBAE protocol (domestic french data)

cardholderAuthenticationValueCalculation.description:
Cardholder authentication value calculation method
Identifies the calculation method used by the issuer to generate the electronic commerce cryptogram
Equivalent to DE59.0411 in CBAE protocol (domestic french data)

cardholderAuthenticationValueProcessingI.description:
Cardholder authentication value processing information
Equivalent to DE059-0409 in CBAE protocol

cardOnFileAction.description:
CARD-ON-FILE Action
Equivalent to DE057-0029 in CBAE protocol
Value : Label
---------------------------------------------------------------------
ADDC : Add card
KEEP : Keep card

x-enumDescriptions.CSNI: Cardholder has informed merchant that no card security code is printed on his card.
x-enumDescriptions.CSPI: Card security code present on cardholder's card, but illegible (therefore not sent)
x-enumDescriptions.DCVF: dCVV2 checked and failed; CVV2 validation performed (for Visa incoming only)
x-enumDescriptions.DCVP: dCVV2 validation performed (for Visa incoming only)
x-enumDescriptions.NSTM: Card security code is not sent by the merchant

cardSecurityCodePresence.description:
Information on card security code presence
Equivalent to DE59.0300 part 1 in CBAE protocol (domestic french data)
Value : Label (ISO8583 based protocols value)
---------------------------------------------------------------------
NSTM : Card security code is not sent by the merchant (0)
CSCP : Card security code present (1)
CSPI : Card security code present on cardholder's card, but illegible (therefore not sent) (2)
DCVP : dCVV2 validation performed (for Visa incoming only) (3)
DCVF : dCVV2 checked and failed; CVV2 validation performed (for Visa incoming only) (4)
CSNI : Cardholder has informed merchant that no card security code is printed on his card (9)

x-enumDescriptions.VRCR: Card security code verification response code requested
x-enumDescriptions.VRVR: Card security code verification response code requested and 'Card security code verification results' requested

cardSecurityCodeVerificationInformation.description:
Information on card security code verification
Equivalent to DE59.0300 part 3 in CBAE protocol (domestic french data)
Value : Label (ISO8583 based protocols value)
---------------------------------------------------------------------
VRCR : Card security code verification response code requested (0)
VRVR : Card security code verification response code requested and 'Card security code verification results' requested (1)

debitCreditIndicator.description:
Debit or Credit Indicator
Value : Label
---------------------------------------------------------------------
CRDT : Credit
DEBT : Debit

DS Transaction ID
Equivalent to DE057-0023-p2 for a DS ID in CBAE protocol

ecommerceIndicator.description:
Electronic commerce indicator (VISA)
Equivalent to DE59.0416 in CBAE protocol (domestic french data)

x-enumDescriptions.ACMO: Authentication cryptogram issued from a mobile  (CB2A 21)
x-enumDescriptions.ACXX: Authentication cryptogram issued from a server (CB2A 20)

electronicCommerceAuthenticationNature.description:
Electronic commerce transaction authentication type
Equivalent to DE59.0407 in CBAE protocol (domestic french data)
Value : Label (ISO8583 bases protocols value)
----------------------------------------------------------------
ACNS : Legacy – Non-secured electronic commerce transaction (08)
ACNO : No authentication cryptogram (09)
ACXX : Authentication cryptogram (20)
ACMO : Authentication cryptogram issued from a mobile (21)

extendedEcommerceIndicator.description:
Extended electronic commerce indicator (SLI - Mastercard)
Equivalent to DE57.0015 in CBAE protocol (domestic french data)

forwardingId.description:
Transmitter ID or original Sender Id (for an advice)
Equivalent to DE33 in ISO8583 based protocols

functionCode.description:
Function code
Specifies the purpose of a message within its message class
Equivalent to DE59.0100 in CBAE protocol (domestic french data)

fundsTransferApplicationNature.description:
type of application which initiate fund transfer
Equivalent to DE118-1001 in CBAE protocol

fundTransferReason.description:
Reason of fund transfer
Equivalent to DE118-1003 in CBAE protocol

geographicalOrigin.description:
Geographical origin of the transaction
Determine whether the transaction is domestic or international
The IAS determines the geographical location of the transaction (ie : 'national' or 'international') according to the country code of the acceptor or, if not available in the transaction, to the country code of the acquirer and a list of countries considered as national for the issuer bank
Value : Label
---------------------------------------------------------------------
INTR : International
NTNL : National

internationalAuthorisationNetwork.description:
International authorisation network identifier
Equivalent to DE59.0803 in CBAE protocol (domestic french data)
Value : Label
---------------------------------------------------------------------
1 : Visa
2 : Mastercard

x-enumDescriptions.IASB: Issuer and acquirer are the same bank
x-enumDescriptions.IASG: Issuer and acquirer belongs to the same group

issuerAcquirerRelation.description:
Relation between issuer and acquirer
Type of relation between the issuer and acquirer
The IAS determines the relation with a given acquirer based on :
- when the acquiring institution is the cardholder's bank then the acquirer is considered as a 'Same Bank'
- when the leading institution of the acquiring institution is also the leading institution of the cardholder's bank then the acquirer is considered as a 'Same group'
- Otherwise the acquirer is considered as 'not US'

Value : Label
---------------------------------------------------------------------
IASB : Issuer and acquirer are the same bank
IASG : Issuer and acquirer belongs to the same group
NFUS : Not from us

Issuer Authentication Data
Equivalent to DE055-0091 in CBAE protocol

Equivalent to DE59.0101 in CBAE protocol (domestic french data)

Equivalent to DE100-1 in CBAE protocol

operationReferenceId.description:
Operation reference Internal to IAS
Unique identifier generated by the IAS to identify the operation (request/response messages)

x-enumDescriptions.CHFM: Chip mode with fallback to manual mode (incoming only)

Pan Entry Mode (CBAE)
Card data entry mode used at the point of service
Equivalent to DE22 part 1 in ISO8583 based protocols
Value : Label (ISO8583 based protocols value)
---------------------------------------------------------------------
NOTS : Not specified (00)
MANU : Manual (01)
MAGS : Magstripe only (02)
OPTI : Optical code (04)
BARC : Barcode (03)
CHON : Chip only (05)
CUCD : Contactless using chip data (07)
FILE : Card-on-file (10)
CHFM : Chip mode with fallback to manual mode (79)
CHFG : Chip mode with fallback to magstripe mode (90)
SERV : Provided by a server (wallet) (82)
MAGO : Magstripe only (61)
CUMD : Contactless using magstripe data (91)
DSRP : PAN/Token entry via ECOM containing DSRP cryptogram (09)

INST :Instalment (03)

PREA :Pre-authorisation (Other than Reservation and Rental) (07)
PTRL :Indoor Petrol station pre-authorisation (10)
DERS :Deposit-refund system
QCPM :Quasi cah payment
FTPM :Funds transfer
NPVC :Non payment card validity check (90)

x-enumDescriptions.TLDR: CBAE 1.5 Value : 07  Telephone device request (via call centre)
x-enumDescriptions.UTAR: CBAE 1.5 Value : 02  Unattended terminal able to retain card
x-enumDescriptions.UTUR: CBAE 1.5 Value : 27  Unattended terminal unable to retain card

Conditions of the transaction
Equivalent to DE25 in CBAE protocol (domestic french data)
Value : Label (ISO8583 bases protocols value)
----------------------------------------------------------------
STDR : Normal conditions (00)
CUNP : Customer not present (01)
UTAR : Unattended terminal able to retain card (02)
MESU : Merchant suspicious (03)
CPCA : Customer present, card not present (05)
TLDR : Telephone device request (via call centre) (07)
MTOR : Mail/telephone order (08)
CUIV : Customer identity verified (10)
SUFR : Suspected fraud (11)
SERE : Security reasons (12)
CUTE : Customer terminal (home terminal) (15)
UTUR : Unattended terminal unable to retain card (27)
FLCO : Flow control (memory card) (51)
MAOR : Mail order (52)
TLOR : Telephone order (53)

Pre authorisation duration
Indicates how many days a pre-authorised invoice is valid.

items.description:

Equivalent to DE119-0004 in CBAE protocol

VISA : VISA (1)
MACD : Mastercard (2) = "MCC102"

x-enumDescriptions.CHDS: Cardholder data storage on merchant file
x-enumDescriptions.UNSN: Recurring payment, unknown sequence number (reserved for international incoming flow)

Service attribute
Service attribute in the case of recurring payment transactions and pre-autorisation in the context of rentals

----------------------------------------------------------------

Service Indicator

Nature of transaction

---------------------------------------------------------------------

QUCA : Quasi-cash (11)
CACP : Card capture (14)

QCAR : Quasi-cash refund (28)
AVFI : Available funds inquiry (30)

items.description:
Exchange rate information
Equivalent to 114-33
The information associated to the exchange rate depends on the network.
If the network is VISA, two occurrencies of exchange rate can be present with :
- the exchange rate origin to identify if the rate is from the scheme or from the European Central Bank (ECB)
- the exchange rate
- the exchange rate provider
- the rate table id
- the persistent fx eligible indicator
If the network is Mastercard, one occurence of exchange rate can be present with :
- the exchange rate origin (always European Central Bank)
- the exchange rate
- the rate differential sign indicator
- the rate percent differential

network.description:
Exchange rate information
Network providing the exchange rate
Value : Label
---------------------------------------------------------------------
VISA : VISA
MACD : Mastercard

exchangeRateOrigin.description:
Exchange rate information
Origin of the exchange rate
For VISA, determined from the exchange rate provider
For Mastercard, always European Central Bank
Value : Label
---------------------------------------------------------------------
ECBR : European Central Bank Rate
SCHR : Scheme Rate

exchangeRate.description:
Exchange rate information
Exchange rate value
The exchange rate is expressed as a decimal

exchangeRateProvider.description:
Exchange rate information
Exchange rate provider (VISA only)
Label identifying the source of the rate which allows to determine the origin of the exchange rate : contains "ECB" if the rate is provided by the European Central Bank

persistentFxEligibleIndicator.description:
Exchange rate information
Persistent fx service eligibility indicator (VISA only).
Applicable on authorisation-only transactions.

rateDiffPercent.description:
Exchange rate information
Rate percent differential (Mastercard only)
Ratio between billing amount conversion rate and ECB conversion rate (effective currency conversion markup of the transaction), expressed with an implied 2 digits decimal. Eg : "12345" for a 123.45 ratio

rateDiffSign.description:
Exchange rate information
Rate differential sign indicator (Mastercard only)
Value : Label
---------------------------------------------------------------------
CRDT : Crédit: indicates that billing amount conversion rate is larger than or equal to ECB conversion rate.
DEBT : Debit: indicates that billing amount conversion rate is smaller than ECB conversion rate.

rateTableId.description:
Exchange rate information
Rate table id of the foreign exchange rate table used for currency conversion (VISA only)

cumulativeTotalAuthorisedAmount.description:
Total Amount cumulative authorised
Equivalent to DE054-43 in CBAE protocol

applicationCryptogram.description:
Certificate returned in response to a cryptogram generation
Equivalent to DE055-9F26 in CBAE protocol

applicationTransactionCounter.description:
Application Transaction Counter
Equivalent to DE055-9F36 in CBAE protocol

cryptogramInformationData.description:
Code indicating which type of certificate is returned
Equivalent to DE055-9F27 in CBAE protocol

issuerApplicationData.description:
data that the issuer wants to return in authorisation messages
Equivalent to DE055-9F10 in CBAE protocol

randomNumber.description:
Unpredictable number used for security
Equivalent to DE055-9F37 in CBAE protocol

terminalTransactionDate.description:
Terminal's local date of the autorisation
Equivalent to DE055-009A in CBAE protocol

terminalVerificationResult.description:
Results of the different checks performed by the termina
Equivalent to DE055-0095 in CBAE protocol

emvAquisitionMode.description:
EMV aquisition mode
Equivalent to DE55-DFC0 in CBAE protocol

fileNumber.description:
File number
File number (used as a reference for a pre-authorisation invoice)
Equivalent to DE47.24 in CBAE protocol (domestic french data)

iccOtherAmount.description:
Transaction other amount
Equivalent to DE55-9F03 in CBAE protocol

code.description:
IAS (Issuer Authorisation Server) control code
Code to identify a control performed by the issuer authorization server on the transaction.
Each control implemented in the authorization server has a code and each control performed is provided in the event (by repeating the data element and its corresponding response code)

responseCode.description:
IAS (Issuer Authorisation Server) control response code
Response code of the control identified by the controlCode attribute
Each control implemented in the authorization server has a response code and each control performed is provided in the event (by repeating the data element and its corresponding code)

amlResponseCode.description: Response code from the AML system

cardAvailableAmount.description:
Card available amount
Amount and currency available for the card after the processing of the transaction
The curency is provided as a ISO 4217, Numeric-3 code.
The amount is provided as a number of monetary units specified in a currency where the unit of currency is implied by the context and compliant with ISO 4217. The decimal separator is a dot.

fraudResponseCode.description: Response code from the fraud system

fraudScore.description: Score provided by the fraud system

reversalReason.description:
Reason of reversal transported
Response code received in a reversal message also know as reversal reason code
Equivalent to DE39 inbound
The reason code is provided as a 2 digit numeric code.

locationCategoryCode.description:
Location Category Code
Equivalent to DE47-08 in CBAE protocol

mastercardPointOfServiceChangeStatusCode.description:
Mastercard POS change status code
Equivalent to DE47-71 in CBAE protocol

merchantProgram.description:
Merchan program
Equivalent to DE114-30-0 in CBAE protocol

microchipProcessingResult.description:
Microchip Processing Result
Equivalent to DE055-DF80 in CBAE protocol

multiplePaymentValidityDate.description:
Validity date for a multiple payment
Equivalent to DE057-0045 in CBAE protocol

originalUniqueIdNetwork.description:
Original unique transaction identifier Network
Entity responsible for encoding the original unique identifier
Equivalent to DE47.99 part 1 (nomenclature) in CBAE protocol (domestic french data)

Value : Label
------------------------------------------------------------------------
CBFR : CB
VISA : VISA
MACD : Mastercard

originalUniqueIdValue.description:
Original unique transaction identifier Value
Value of the original unique identifier of the Customer Initiated Transaction used as reference for linking.
Equivalent to DE47.99 part 2 in CBAE protocol (domestic french data)

partialAuthorisedAmount.description:
Authorised amount (partial authorisation)
Amount and currency authorised either by the Host in its response or by the IAS in the notification (the authorised amount can be different from the requested amount in case of partial authorisation)
The curency is provided as a ISO 4217, Numeric-3 code.
The amount is provided as a number of monetary units specified in a currency where the unit of currency is implied by the context and compliant with ISO 4217. The decimal separator is a dot.

partialAuthorisedOriginalAmount.description:
Original amount (partial authorisation)
Partial amount and currency authorised on the original transaction
The curency is provided as a ISO 4217, Numeric-3 code.
The amount is provided as a number of monetary units specified in a currency where the unit of currency is implied by the context and compliant with ISO 4217. The decimal separator is a dot.

replacementAmount.description:
Replacement amount
Amount and currency of the replacement amount in a reversal
Used to indicate the amount actually granted to the cardholder in a reversal transaction. If this field is missing, the entire transaction was cancelled.
The curency is provided as a ISO 4217, Numeric-3 code.
The amount is provided as a number of monetary units specified in a currency where the unit of currency is implied by the context and compliant with ISO 4217. The decimal separator is a dot.

replacementBillingAmount.description:
New amount, cardholder billing
Amount and currency of the cardholder billing replacement amount in a reversal
The curency is provided as a ISO 4217, Numeric-3 code.
The amount is provided as a number of monetary units specified in a currency where the unit of currency is implied by the context and compliant with ISO 4217. The decimal separator is a dot.

saleReference.description:
Sale Reference Number
Sale/Retrieval reference number
Equivalent to DE37 in ISO8583 based protocols

Brand selected by the cardholder
Equivalent to DE057-0003 in CBAE protocol

Session ID
Equivalent to DE119-0006 in CBAE protocol

Equivalent to DE116-1 in CBAE protocol

Equivalent to DE057-0032 in CBAE protocol

Value : Label (ISO8583 bases protocols value)
----------------------------------------------------------------
3DCH : Challenge (CH)
3DFR : Frictionless (FR)

componentsAvailability.description:
3DS components availability
Equivalent to DE119-0013 in CBAE protocol

x-enumDescriptions.NATR: No authentication: transaction risk analysis already performed
x-enumDescriptions.NPDV: No preference – default value if the data element is absent or not set to a value

merchantRequestAuthentication.description:
Merchant request for authentication
Merchant request for authentication corresponds to the 3DS requestor challenge indicator data element in the EMVCo 3DS specification.
Equivalent to DE59.0419 part 2 in CBAE protocol (domestic french data)
Value : Label (ISO8583 bases protocols value)
----------------------------------------------------------------
AUTD : Authentication required (04)
AUTQ : Authentication requested (03)
AUTR : Authentication required (09)
NAAP : No authentication: SCA already performed (07)
NADS : No authentication: data share only (06)
NATR : No authentication: transaction risk analysis already performed (05)
NAUT : No authentication (02)
NAUW : No authentication: whitelist (08)
NPDV : No preference – default value if the data element is absent or not set to a value (01)

3DS Protocol Version Scheme Specific

----------------------------------------------------------------

VISA : VISA (1)

CB 3DS score

transactionStatusReason.description:
Transaction status reason
Corresponds to the Transaction Status Reason data element of the EMVCo 3DS V2 specification
Equivalent to DE59.0419 part 3 in CBAE protocol (domestic french data)

visaIndicator.description:
3D-Secure indicator
Equivalent to DE119-0007 in CBAE protocol

x-enumDescriptions.PWNF: CBAE 1.5 Value : 00  Payment or Transaction with no special features

totalAmount.description:
Total Amount
Amount, currency of the transaction + account usage of the account
In the checkBalance :
- If DE6 present, equivalent to DE6 and DE51 in ISO8583 based protocols (cardholder billing amount and currency)
- Otherwise, equivalent to DE4 and DE49 in ISO8583 based protocols (transaction amount and currency)
In other messages :
- Equivalent to DE4 and DE49 in ISO8583 based protocols
The curency is provided as a ISO 4217, Numeric-3 code.
The amount is provided as a number of monetary units specified in a currency where the unit of currency is implied by the context and compliant with ISO 4217. The decimal separator is a dot.

For totalAmount.accountUsage : Type of usage indicator to identify whether the debit is immediate or deferred
Value : Label
---------------------------------------------------------------------
DEAC : Debit account (Immediate)
DEDA : Deferred debit account

validationCode.description:
Validation code
Equivalent to DE59-602 in CBAE protocol

visaProgramQualification.description:
Program qualification
Equivalent to DE59-600 in CBAE protocol

walletIdentifier.description:
Wallet identifier
Wallet identifier assigned when the wallet is approved.
Equivalent to DE59.0418 in CBAE protocol (domestic french data)

authorisationCode.description:
authorisation identification response
Authorisation response identification (also called autorisation number)
Equivalent to DE38 in ISO8583 based protocols
The authorisation identification response can be provided by the Host in its reponse. In this case it is also used by the IAS in its response to the authorisation request.
Or the authorisation identification response is calculated by the IAS.

code.description:
Response Code
Determined by IAS and provided in its reponse
Equivalent to DE39 in ISO8583 based protocols
The response code is provided as a 2 digit numeric code.

MACD : MasterCard gateway
NTWK : Authorisation network
OTHR : Other
UPIC : UPI gateway
VISA : Visa gateway

Field number
Equivalent to DE044-AC-p2 in CBAE protocol

Initial value or the value used on an approved network
Equivalent to DE044-AC-p3 in CBAE protocol

Error code
Equivalent to DE044-AA-p3 in CBAE protocol
Value : Label
---------------------------------------------------------------------
FRER : Format error
FRMT : Format or match error detected by remote network
MMFI : Missing mandatory field
VAER : Value error
WRPF : Wrongly present in forbidden field

maximumAmountAuthorisable.description:
Maximum amount for which an authorisation can be granted

x-enumDescriptions.DIAC: Display for the acceptor and the cardholder
x-enumDescriptions.PDAC: Print and display for the acceptor and the cardholder
x-enumDescriptions.PDAO: Print and display for the acceptor only
x-enumDescriptions.PDCO: Print and display for the cardholder only
x-enumDescriptions.PRAC: Print for the acceptor and the cardholder

messageToTransactionInitiatorCtrlCharact.description:
Control character
Equivalent to DE044-BC-p1 in CBAE protocol
Value : Label
---------------------------------------------------------------------
DFAO : Display for acceptor only
DIAC : Display for the acceptor and the cardholder
DSCO : Display for cardholder only
DSPL : Display
PDAC : Print and display for the acceptor and the cardholder
PDAO : Print and display for the acceptor only
PDCO : Print and display for the cardholder only
PFAO : Print for acceptor only
PRAC : Print for the acceptor and the cardholder
PRCO : Print for cardholder only
PRDS : Print and display
PRNT : Print
REPV : Reserved for private use
RSVD : Reserved

messageToTransactionInitiatorMessage.description:
Response message
Equivalent to DE044-BC-p2 in CBAE protocol

minimumAmountAuthorisable.description:
Minimum amount authorisable
Equivalent to DE44-BF in CBAE protocol

x-enumDescriptions.ACIM: Authentication cryptogram issued from a mobile

modifiedElectronicCommerceAuthentificati.description:
Modified electronic commerce authentication type
Equivalent to DE059-0413 in CBAE protocol
Value : Label
----------------------------------------------------------------
ACIM : Authentication cryptogram issued from a mobile
AUTC : Authentication cryptogram
NOAC : No authentication cryptogram

reasonInformationCode.description:
Refusal or acceptance code
Equivalent to DE044-AD-p2 in CBAE protocol

reasonInformationEntitySource.description:
Entity responsible for the response
Equivalent to DE044-AD-p1 in CBAE protocol
Value : Label
---------------------------------------------------------------------
ACQU : Acquirer
DISC : Reserved for Discover
JCB0 : JCB gateway
MACD : MasterCard gateway
NTWK : Authorisation network
OTHR : Other
SICB : SICB
UPIC : UPI gateway
VISA : Visa gateway

respondingMachineId.description:
Responding machine identification code
Equivalent to DE058 in CBAE protocol

securityErrorField.description:
Security error field
Equivalent to DE44-AB p1 in CBAE protocol

x-enumDescriptions.ECRE: Reasonableness check error following decryption (due to an incorrect key) : 06
x-enumDescriptions.ECSD: Security error in server domain (for use by the Network only) : 05
x-enumDescriptions.ECUL: Unable to load key – maximum number of keys already loaded : 03

securityErrorNature.description:
Security error nature
Equivalent to DE44-AB p2 in CBAE protocol
Value : Label
---------------------------------------------------------------------
ECIE : Integrity error (incorrect field 64 or 128) : 02
ECKE : Key already exists : 04
ECKN : Key does not exist : 01
ECRE : Reasonableness check error following decryption (due to an incorrect key) : 06
ECSD : Security error in server domain (for use by the Network only) : 05
ECUL : Unable to load key – maximum number of keys already loaded : 03

uniqueTransactionIdNetwork.description:
Transaction Id network
Entity responsible for encoding the unique transaction identifier
Equivalent to DE47.95 part 1 (nomenclature) in CBAE protocol (domestic french data)
Value : Label
---------------------------------------------------------------------
CBFR : CB
VISA : VISA
MACD : Mastercard

uniqueTransactionIdValue.description:
Unique transaction Id value
Value of the unique transaction identifier generated by the entity responsible (uniqueTransactionNetworkSource)
Equivalent to DE47.95 part 2 (unique transaction identifier) in CBAE protocol and to DE62.2 in BASEI protocol

acsTransactionId.description:
ACS Transaction ID
Equivalent to DE119-0046-p2 in CBAE protocol

authenticationAmount.description:
Authentication Amount
Equivalent to DE119-0046-p6 in CBAE protocol

authenticationDateTime.description:
Authentication Date
Equivalent to DE119-0046-p5 in CBAE protocol
The date and time are specified in the following form (ISO8601 datetime format)

authorisationCode.description:
authorisation code from original transaction stored
Authorisation identification code (also called autorisation number) from the original transaction
Equivalent to DE38 (from the original transaction) in ISO8583 based protocols

cardholderAuthenticationValue.description:
Cardholder Authentication value
Equivalent to DE119-0420-p6 in CBAE protocol

cardholderAuthenticationValueCalculation.description:
Cardholder authentication value calculation method
Equivalent to DE119-0420-p3 in CBAE protocol

cardholderWalletAuthenticationMethod.description:
Cardholder authenticationMethod for a wallet
Equivalent to DE119-0420-p2 in CBAE protocol

dsTransactionId.description:
DS Transaction ID
Equivalent to DE119-0046-p3 in CBAE protocol

x-enumDescriptions.ACMO: Authentication cryptogram issued from a mobile  (CB2A 21)
x-enumDescriptions.ACXX: Authentication cryptogram issued from a server (CB2A 20)

electronicCommerceAuthenticationNature.description:
Electronic commerce transaction authentication type
Equivalent to DE119-0420-p1 in CBAE protocol
Value : Label
---------------------------------------------------------------------
ACMO : Authentication cryptogram issued from a mobile : CBAE 21
ACNO : No authentication cryptogram : CBAE 09
ACNS : Legacy – Non-secured electronic commerce transaction : CBAE 08
ACXX : Authentication cryptogram : CBAE 20

localDateTime.description:
local transaction date time in original message
Equivalent to DE12, DE13 and DE59.102 (from the original transaction) in ISO8583 based protocols
The date and time are specified in the following form (ISO8601 datetime format)

reference.description:
reference of initial transaction
Transaction reference/audit number of the original transaction
Equivalent to DE90 part 2 in ISO8583 based protocols

responseCode.description:
Response Code from Original Transaction
Response code from the original transaction
In authorisation advices, this corresponds to DE39 received in the advice.
In reversals, this corresponds to DE39 from the original transaction stored in IAS (if the reversal has been matched with the original transaction)
The response code is provided as a 2 digit numeric code.

securedRemotePaymentArchitectureResult.description:
Result of using a secured remote payment architecture
Equivalent to DE119-0420-p4 in CBAE protocol

securedRemotePaymentArchitectureResultEx.description:
Extension of result of using a secured payment architecture
Equivalent to DE119-0420-p5 in CBAE protocol

threeDsProtocolVersion.description:
3DS protocol major version
Equivalent to DE119-0046-p1 in CBAE protocol
Value : Label
---------------------------------------------------------------------
3DS1 : 3DS version v1
3DS2 : 3DS version v2
UNKW : Unknown

transmissionGmtDateTime.description:
initial transmission gmt date time
Transmission date and time of the original transaction
Equivalent to DE90 part 3 in ISO8583 based protocols
The date and time are specified in the following form (ISO8601 datetime format)
